title: Gill
overview: A boy called Gon was on the verge of death, when suddenly gills started to grow and he could breathe again. Kang Ha and his grandpa rescue Gon and together they become an odd family.

trailers.title: Gill [ 아가미 ] Directed by Ahn Jae-huun
